title: Thelypteris dulongjiangensis
taxonomy: Thelypteris dulongjiangensis is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the marsh ferns or autumn ferns. The genus Thelypteris is a part of this family and includes around 200 species of ferns. These plants are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions, and they are often characterized by their distinctive fronds and habitats. As a member of the family Thelypteridaceae, Thelypteris dulongjiangensis shares many characteristics with other species within this family, including its typical frond arrangement and leaf shape. Within its genus, Thelypteris dulongjiangensis can be distinguished from other species through its unique morphological features and distribution.
